The '''T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==Characteristics==
This version of the venerable starfighter retains the third [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher from that standard [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter|XJ X-wing]] while increasing the number of [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]] carried to twelve.<ref name="NJOS" /> It also incorporated backup [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|generators]] that proved useful against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Dovin basal|"shield grab" attack]].<ref name="sotg(se)" /> Additionally it boasts improved targeting systems, maneuverability, avionics, and [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], which fired blue rather than red lasers. Compared to the earlier series of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]], the XJ was a great improvement.<ref name="NJOS" />

==History==
Shortly before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the New Republic deployed the first of the XJ-series X-wing. Originally, it was issued to elite [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] aboard [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and the [[New Jedi Order]], which resulted in the craft being one of the first to face the deadly [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]].<ref name="NJOS" />

In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the XJ3 X-wing was introduced. Among the improvements it introduced was a mechanism to bring the shields down, then back up to keep them from being overloaded by [[dovin basal]]s, a launcher (on Jedi craft) for their [[Jedi shadow bomb|shadow bombs]], and [[Stutter-fire]] lasers that helped to get past the dovin basal shields of the Yuuzhan Vong ships.<ref name="NJOS" />
